column1: # PRODUCT RECIPES TEMPLATE - Fill this sheet fourth (after products and raw materials)
# Each row = One material needed to make a product
# IMPORTANT: Product Name must exactly match Product Name from PRODUCTS sheet
# IMPORTANT: Material Name must exactly match Material Name from RAW MATERIALS sheet
# 1. Product Name: Must exactly match Product Name from PRODUCTS sheet (REQUIRED)
# 2. Material Name: Must exactly match Material Name from RAW MATERIALS sheet (REQUIRED)

column2: "product" if using other products as ingredients

column1: # 4. Quantity Needed: How much of this material is needed to make one product (REQUIRED)
# 6. Cost Per Unit: Price per unit (usually same as in RAW MATERIALS sheet)
# 7. Total Cost: Quantity × Cost Per Unit
# 8. Production Time: How many minutes this step takes
